svg.text: concept a / projection-first dashboard / semantic agent tokens
Board actions stay rare and consequential.
Approval is isolated here, not spread across the whole UI.

g.text: delta preview ready. board token appears only inside review flow.
provider timeout / circuit breaker / retry storm
crimson is reserved for true fault states, not checker role.
owned by engineering with active checker handoff.
review notes compiled / docs synced / backlog triage
support work stays visible without stealing the stage.

svg.text: The main stage is the governed workflow, not the mascot system.
Tickets, review gates, and runtime health dominate the composition.

g.text: owner path: ceo -> visual worker -> checker -> board gate
preview strip + evidence summary instead of raw compiled_role by default.

svg.text: Agent tokens add semantic memory without taking over the product.
Workforce is a secondary surface. The cluster lives here, not in the page center.

g.text: thin silk lines show active leases from the routing core.
tokens remain abstract and operational, not cute mascots.
ticket leased / ceo -> eng_worker_02 / runtime slice
review pack compiled / visual_shell_v1 / delta attached
board review required / visual checkpoint / pack opened
circuit breaker opened / provider timeout / debug takeover reserved
incident mode should become a separate crimson full-screen state.
concept notes: control plane first, review room as dedicated overlay, abstract tokenized agents, checker moved off crimson so incident mode keeps exclusive alarm authority.
